title: cousinia hymenostephanus
intro: Cousinia hymenostephanus, also known as Cousinia, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae), native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cousinia include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
